nodes.context: A set of the Piru gang alliance and part of the Bloods alliance, involved in drug trafficking, arms dealing, and robbery.
A gang founded in 1969 by Sylvester Scott and Vincent Owens, initially associated with the Crips but later formed the Bloods alliance.
A larger street gang that the Piru Street Boys were initially associated with or victimized by.
An alliance formed by the Piru Street Boys and other gangs in 1972, opposing the Crips.
One of the smaller street gangs that allied with the Piru Street Boys to form the Bloods.
One of the smaller street gangs that allied with the Piru Street Boys to form the Bloods.
One of the smaller street gangs that allied with the Piru Street Boys to form the Bloods.
A Piru set that was previously one gang with Mob Piru, later became rivals.
An ally of Mob Piru according to the infobox.
A rival of Mob Piru according to the infobox.
A rival of Mob Piru according to the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The Mob Piru ... is a 'set' of the Piru gang alliance
edges.context: Mob Piru is a set within the Piru gang alliance, which originated from Piru Street Boys.

edges.evidence_quote: which is itself part of the larger Bloods alliance
edges.context: Mob Piru is part of the Bloods alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: the Piru Street Boys were initially associated with the Crips, but later had a falling out
edges.context: Piru Street Boys were initially associated with the Crips but later fell out.

edges.evidence_quote: by 1972, the Piru Street Boys formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips. This alliance became known as the Bloods
edges.context: Piru Street Boys formed the Bloods alliance with other gangs.

edges.evidence_quote: the Mob Piru and Lueders Park Piru were previously one gang, until they split apart
edges.context: Mob Piru and Lueders Park Piru were previously one gang but split.

edges.evidence_quote: Although the two gangs were allies, a rivalry developed after a Lueders Park Piru member was murdered in April 2009, leading to a series of shootings between 2009 and 2013.
edges.context: Mob Piru and Lueders Park Piru were allies but later developed a rivalry with shootings from 2009 to 2013.
Elm Street Piru is listed as an ally of Mob Piru in the infobox.
South Side Compton Crips is listed as a rival of Mob Piru in the infobox.
Santana Blocc Compton Crips is listed as a rival of Mob Piru in the infobox.
Cross Atlantic Piru is listed as a rival of Mob Piru in the infobox.
